title: 'Changing Political Parties for Selfish Needs is Not Right Thing': Anna Hazare on Raghav Chadha's Break-Up With AAP
description: Hazare was the primary figurehead and ideological mentor for the Aam Aadmi Party's formation via his 2011 anti-corruption movement, though he later distanced himself from Arvind Kejriwal due to the move into mainstream politics.
